authored_content_policy: terrain, obstacles, equipment, materials, and animation are authored in-project

import_conversion_settings.boot_binding_policy: author deform boot_bind_l and boot_bind_r bones before pose evaluation
import_conversion_settings.data_purge_policy: remove source scenes, worlds, cameras, lights, actions, images, texts, libraries, and unused data
import_conversion_settings.material_policy: replace source materials with authored deterministic materials
import_conversion_settings.rig_sanitization: remove Rigify/control bones, constraints, drivers, custom properties, actions, and text blocks
import_conversion_settings.root_normalization: pelvis-origin body FRD metres using frozen R_root_from_source and metric_scale
import_conversion_settings.save_policy: save uncompressed with relative-path remapping disabled
import_conversion_settings.source_operation: append selected objects from the selected source blend
import_conversion_settings.source_transform_precondition: all four appended object transforms must be identity

rejected_external_content: all alternate character bodies and exports
all hairstyle trees and unrelated textures
all nested Godot, Unity, and Unreal Engine archives
source scenes, worlds, cameras, lights, actions, and Rigify widgets
embedded rig_ui.py and all other Text datablocks
external image paths, creator-machine paths, and forest.exr
